subtasks.description: Evaluate the developer's production database access request against policy governance rules. Check for applicable policies on production access, live debugging permissions, developer role authorization, and any required approval workflows or compliance constraints.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask at mid tier. This is explicitly a governance/access control decision (production database access request) requiring policy evaluation against potentially multiple rules (role-based access, production environment restrictions, debugging scope, audit logging requirements). Mid tier is appropriate for multi-policy reasoning with context-dependent decision logic. No data retrieval subtasks are needed—the policy decision is the primary requirement here.

output.reason: Developer lacks Manager approval and on-call role required by POL-401; POL-402 mandates debugging occur in staging environment, not production.
applied_constraints: Redirect debugging activity to staging environment
